{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201704470EAEAA790D433F2ABD0E"}"},"total":32},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7301920007796720435","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"get了村上短篇的魔力，内心的轨迹和形状能用文字这么精确的呈现，有些段落和自己某些时刻一模一样，就像被他看穿了似的，很佩服他的描写功力，品川猴那篇特别好，有种悲伤的美感，我宁愿相信品川猴是真的，如果真的有，这个世界上肯定还有别的“会说话的物种”存在，妙。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700111630,"group_id":"7261897841373613092","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"写自由，自由写，哦耶","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5DrVtzOZlwrMifwboPNu+g=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d4f2c8da477043a7967657a7ecdd348d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533692&x-signature=qGKH7nCVypxA%2Bed%2B%2FzwsjsFJzeI%3D","user_id":"88880420018","user_name":"喜欢雨天的向日葵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"88880420018","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7261897841373613092","book_info":{"abstract":"《第一人称单数》村上春树睽违六年的短篇小说集。当世界不断变迁，唯有故事留住刹那光景。再不相见的男女···名为村上春树的角色···偷人姓名的品川猴···夏日气息与摇滚乐。
短篇小说，是一个世界的无数切口。
“第一人称单数”是截取世界某个片段的“单眼”。这样的截面越来越多，“单眼”就成了无穷交错的“复眼”。到那时，我便不再是我，你也不再是你。到那时，会发生什么？不会发生什么？欢迎来到“第一人称单数”的世界。八个题材视角各异的精彩短篇，用“我”的第一人称视角亲口讲述。可以说是迈入从心所欲不逾矩之年的村上春树，回望人生爱与死主题的珠玉之作连发。结合了短歌、散文、音乐与小说，展开村上风格的全新复眼小说。阅读村上小说，徜徉文学世界，活着不就是一首对于青春、爱与死亡的追想曲！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/7fc2051ae15cea1eb39cec88b1f262d0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"[日]村上春树 著,烨伊 译","author_id":"","book_id":"7261897841373613092","book_name":"第一人称单数","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d8c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"5.3万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":941,"name":"文学经典","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=941&name=文学经典&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":397,"name":"外国文学","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=397&name=外国文学&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7613615470775634969","read_count":"2019","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"75689"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"10","tags":"文学经典,外国文学","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7fc2051ae15cea1eb39cec88b1f262d0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181487&x-signature=H8IVXlINn95ACvL%2BF1rQlmpgtB0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"10"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201704470EAEAA790D433F2ABD0E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4880,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":676},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7374356765242164006","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的短歌写得太好了，尤其是那句“你／和我／离得远吗？在木星换乘／能否抵达？”，让我感觉村上春树对爱和距离的理解真的很深刻。而且每一个短篇都很有味道，就像是在跟作者聊天一样，很亲切。推荐你也读一读这本书，感受一下村上春树的世界。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716459505,"group_id":"7261897841373613092","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6fXWhK07R6IbVsiTVQ8E/w=
